field.keywordsPlaceholder: Type keyword, press Enter to add...
field.specifiedIdsHint: Enter post or video ID/URL, one per line or comma-separated
field.creatorIdsHint: Enter creator ID/URL, one per line or comma-separated

warning.cookieSlider: [Note] Cookie login is not recommended for Xiaohongshu and Douyin due to slider captcha
warning.xhsToken: [Important] Xiaohongshu URLs must contain xsec_token parameter, please copy the full URL from browser

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.cdpRequired: This project uses CDP mode to connect to your local Chrome browser. Please ensure:
prerequisites.step3: Enable 'Allow remote debugging' and ensure port 9222 is open
prerequisites.step4: Click 'Accept' in the Chrome confirmation dialog within 60 seconds of starting
prerequisites.note: For non-CDP mode, set ENABLE_CDP_MODE = False in config/base_config.py
prerequisites.autoLaunchHint: When enabled, the system will automatically open Chrome with remote debugging enabled

qrcode.title: QR Code Login
qrcode.step1: After clicking 'Start', Chrome browser will open automatically
qrcode.step2: Find the QR code on the login page and scan it with your phone app
qrcode.step3: Login session is saved automatically for future crawls

phone.title: Phone Login
phone.step1: After clicking 'Start', Chrome browser will open automatically
phone.step2: Select phone login, enter your number and verification code
phone.step3: Complete login and the session will be saved

cookie.title: Cookie Login
cookie.commonStep1: Log in to the target platform in your browser
cookie.xhsStep2: Press F12 → Network → Copy Cookie header from any request
cookie.dyStep2: Press F12 → Application → Cookies → Copy all cookie strings
cookie.wbStep2: Press F12 → Network → Copy Cookie value from request headers
cookie.defaultStep2: Press F12 → Network → Copy Cookie value from request headers
cookie.commonStep3: Paste the cookie string into the text area below
cookie.commonStep4: Note: cookies expire, you'll need to refresh them periodically
